_doc: RKNPU2 (RK3588 NPU) spec (Phase 1.2 = ANALYTIC). NO RKNPU2 silicon (board offline, issue #13) -> ALL fields simulator/engines/borrowed. Datasheet 6 TOPS INT8; systolic dimension BORROWED from Hexagon 32x32 (HeteroInfer); BW = RK3588 host ~34 GB/s x 59-66% (denominator = 68 peak, HeteroInfer Fig5). No power telemetry -> energy NOT determinable. Upgrade path: issue #13 silicon (superseded-not-satisfied) + ONNXim (Phase 1.3, simulated not silicon).

upgrade.silicon: issue #13 RKNPU2 matmul micro-benchmark (NOT collected; superseded-not-satisfied, not achieved)
upgrade.heavy_sim: ONNXim (Phase 1.3; generic-systolic RKNPU2-approx; simulated, NOT silicon)

notes.energy: no RKNPU2 power telemetry -> energy not determinable.
notes.bw_denominator: 59-66% is of a 68 GB/s peak (HeteroInfer Fig5 single-proc decode), NOT of RK3588's 34.
